  have hz : (m + 1) / (-m ^ 2) ≠ 1 := by intro h; apply hm; field_simp at h; linear_combination h
  use -m * (m + 1), m / (m + 1) ^ 2, (m + 1) / (-m ^ 2)
  simp
  refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · field_simp; ring
  · field_simp; ring

let m (n : ℕ) : ℚ := n + 2
  let a n := 2 * (m n + 1) / (m n ^ 2 + 3)
  let b n := (m n ^ 2 - 1) / (m n ^ 2 + 3)
  let c n := 2 * (1 - m n) / (m n ^ 2 + 3)
  let x n := a n / (a n - 1)
  let y n := b n / (b n - 1)
  let z n := c n / (c n - 1)
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun n ↦ (x n, y n, z n)) ?_ ?_
  · intro n k h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have hy : y n = y k := h.2.1
    have hy_eq (i : ℕ) : y i = (1 - m i ^ 2) / 4 := by
      dsimp [y, b]; field_simp; ring
    rw [hy_eq n, hy_eq k] at hy
    have : m n = m k := by
      have : m n > 0 ∧ m k > 0 := by dsimp [m]; constructor <;> linarith
      nlinarith
    dsimp [m] at this; linarith
  · intro n
    have hm : m n ≥ 2 := by dsimp [m]; linarith
    have hD : m n ^ 2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have ha : a n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [a]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hb : b n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [b]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hc : c n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [c]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have ha0 : a n - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr ha
    have hb0 : b n - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hb
    have hc0 : c n - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hc
    refine ⟨x n, y n, z n, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · simp only [ne_eq]
      refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩ <;>
      { intro h;
        try dsimp [x] at h; try dsimp [y] at h; try dsimp [z] at h
        field_simp at h; linarith }
    · dsimp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring
    · have tx : x n / (x n - 1) = a n := by dsimp [x]; field_simp; ring
      have ty : y n / (y n - 1) = b n := by dsimp [y]; field_simp; ring
      have tz : z n / (z n - 1) = c n := by dsimp [z]; field_simp; ring
      rw [tx, ty, tz]
      dsimp [a, b, c]; field_simp; ring

let a (k : ℚ) := (k + 1) / (k ^ 2 + k + 1)
  let b (k : ℚ) := (k ^ 2 + k) / (k ^ 2 + k + 1)
  let c (k : ℚ) := -k / (k ^ 2 + k + 1)
  let x (k : ℚ) := a k / (a k - 1)
  let y (k : ℚ) := b k / (b k - 1)
  let z (k : ℚ) := c k / (c k - 1)
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun n => (x (n + 1), y (n + 1), z (n + 1))) ?_ ?_
  · intro n m h
    rcases h with ⟨hx, _, _⟩
    have h_inj : ∀ k j : ℚ, 1 ≤ k → 1 ≤ j → a k = a j → k = j := by
      intro k j hk hj heq
      simp only [a] at heq
      field_simp at heq
      nlinarith
    have h_map : ∀ k j : ℚ, a k ≠ 1 → a j ≠ 1 → x k = x j → a k = a j := by
      intro k j _ _ heq
      simp only [x] at heq
      field_simp at heq
      linarith
    have kn_ge_1 : 1 ≤ (n : ℚ) + 1 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have km_ge_1 : 1 ≤ (m : ℚ) + 1 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have an_ne_1 : a (n + 1) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; simp [a] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have am_ne_1 : a (m + 1) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; simp [a] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    norm_cast
    apply h_inj _ _ kn_ge_1 km_ge_1
    apply h_map _ _ an_ne_1 am_ne_1 hx
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    let k : ℚ := n + 1
    have hk : 1 ≤ k := by show 1 ≤ (n : ℚ) + 1; norm_cast; linarith
    have D_ne_zero : k^2 + k + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have ha : a k + b k + c k = 1 := by simp [a, b, c]; field_simp; ring
    have hab : a k * b k + b k * c k + c k * a k = 0 := by simp [a, b, c]; field_simp; ring
    have ha1 : a k ≠ 1 := by intro h; simp [a] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have hb1 : b k ≠ 1 := by intro h; simp [b] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have hc1 : c k ≠ 1 := by intro h; simp [c] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have hx1 : x k ≠ 1 := by simp [x]; intro h; field_simp at h; linarith
    have hy1 : y k ≠ 1 := by simp [y]; intro h; field_simp at h; linarith
    have hz1 : z k ≠ 1 := by simp [z]; intro h; field_simp at h; linarith
    refine ⟨x k, y k, z k, ⟨hx1, hy1, hz1⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · simp only [x, y, z]
      trans (a k * b k * c k) / (a k * b k * c k)
      · congr 1; field_simp [ha1, hb1, hc1]; ring_nf
        have : (a k - 1) * (b k - 1) * (c k - 1) = a k * b k * c k := by
          rw [← add_left_inj (- (a k * b k * c k))]; ring_nf
          rw [ha, hab]; ring
        rw [this]
      · apply div_self
        simp [a, b, c]; field_simp; nlinarith
    · simp only [x, y, z]
      have tx : (a k / (a k - 1)) ^ 2 / (a k / (a k - 1) - 1) ^ 2 = a k ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [ha1]; ring
      have ty : (b k / (b k - 1)) ^ 2 / (b k / (b k - 1) - 1) ^ 2 = b k ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [hb1]; ring
      have tz : (c k / (c k - 1)) ^ 2 / (c k / (c k - 1) - 1) ^ 2 = c k ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [hc1]; ring
      rw [tx, ty, tz]
      rw [← ha]; ring_nf; rw [hab]; ring

let m : ℕ → ℚ := fun k ↦ k + 2
  let x k := -(m k + 1) / (m k) ^ 2
  let y k := -(m k) * (m k + 1)
  let z k := (m k) / (m k + 1) ^ 2
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun k ↦ (x k, y k, z k)) ?_ ?_
  · intro k₁ k₂ h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have hy : y k₁ = y k₂ := h.2.1
    simp [y, m] at hy
    nlinarith
  · intro k
    dsimp
    have hm : m k ≥ 2 := by simp [m]; norm_cast; linarith
    have hx0 : (m k)^2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hz0 : (m k + 1)^2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hx : x k ≠ 1 := by simp [x]; field_simp [hx0]; nlinarith
    have hy : y k ≠ 1 := by simp [y]; nlinarith
    have hz : z k ≠ 1 := by simp [z]; field_simp [hz0]; nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [x, y, z]; field_simp [hx0, hz0]; ring
    · simp [x, y, z]
      field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr hx, sub_ne_zero.mpr hy, sub_ne_zero.mpr hz, hx0, hz0]
      ring

let f : ℕ → ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := fun n =>
    let m : ℚ := n + 2
    (m / (m + 1) ^ 2, -(m + 1) / m ^ 2, -m * (m + 1))
  apply Set.Infinite.mono _ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective _)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    let m : ℚ := n + 2
    have hm : m ≥ 2 := by simp [m]; norm_cast; linarith
    have hd1 : (m + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hd2 : m ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hx : m / (m + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have hy : -(m + 1) / m ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have hz : -m * (m + 1) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; nlinarith
    refine ⟨m / (m + 1) ^ 2, -(m + 1) / m ^ 2, -m * (m + 1), ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · field_simp; ring
    · have h1 : m / (m + 1) ^ 2 - 1 = -(m^2 + m + 1) / (m + 1)^2 := by field_simp; ring
      have h2 : -(m + 1) / m ^ 2 - 1 = -(m^2 + m + 1) / m ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
      have h3 : -m * (m + 1) - 1 = -(m^2 + m + 1) := by ring
      rw [h1, h2, h3]
      have hnz : m ^ 2 + m + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
      field_simp
      ring
  · intro n1 n2 h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    obtain ⟨h, _⟩ := h
    have h1 : ((n1 : ℚ) + 3) ≠ 0 := by have := Nat.cast_nonneg n1; linarith
    have h2 : ((n2 : ℚ) + 3) ≠ 0 := by have := Nat.cast_nonneg n2; linarith
    field_simp at h
    have factor : ((n1 : ℚ) + 2) * ((n2 : ℚ) + 3) ^ 2 - ((n2 : ℚ) + 2) * ((n1 : ℚ) + 3) ^ 2 =
        ((n2 : ℚ) - n1) * (((n1 : ℚ) + 2) * ((n2 : ℚ) + 2) - 1) := by ring
    have eq : ((n2 : ℚ) - n1) * (((n1 : ℚ) + 2) * ((n2 : ℚ) + 2) - 1) = 0 := by
      rw [← factor]
      linarith [h]
    have pos : ((n1 : ℚ) + 2) * ((n2 : ℚ) + 2) - 1 > 0 := by
      have : (n1 : ℚ) ≥ 0 := Nat.cast_nonneg n1
      have : (n2 : ℚ) ≥ 0 := Nat.cast_nonneg n2
      nlinarith
    have : (n2 : ℚ) - n1 = 0 := by nlinarith
    norm_cast at this
    exact this.symm

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    ((1 + k) / -(k ^ 2), -k * (1 + k), k / (1 + k) ^ 2)
  apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem f
  · intro n m h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    rcases h with ⟨_, h, _⟩
    have : (n : ℚ) + 2 = m + 2 := by nlinarith [h]
    norm_cast at this
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have hk : k ≥ 2 := by simp [k]; norm_cast; linarith
    let x := (1 + k) / -(k ^ 2)
    let y := -k * (1 + k)
    let z := k / (1 + k) ^ 2
    have hx : x ≠ 1 := by dsimp [x]; intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    have hy : y ≠ 1 := by dsimp [y]; intro h; nlinarith
    have hz : z ≠ 1 := by dsimp [z]; intro h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    use x, y, z
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · dsimp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring
    · dsimp [x, y, z]
      field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr hx, sub_ne_zero.mpr hy, sub_ne_zero.mpr hz]
      ring

let s (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (k / (k + 1) ^ 2, -(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1))
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective s ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    dsimp [s]
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have hk : 2 ≤ k := by simp [k]; norm_num
    have h1 : k / (k + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      rw [ne_comm, div_eq_one_iff_eq (by nlinarith)]
      nlinarith
    have h2 : -(k + 1) / k ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      rw [ne_comm, div_eq_one_iff_eq (by nlinarith)]
      nlinarith
    have h3 : -k * (k + 1) ≠ 1 := by nlinarith
    refine ⟨_, _, _, ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3⟩, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · field_simp; ring
    · field_simp; ring
  · intro n m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have hz := h.2.2
    dsimp [s] at hz
    let k1 : ℚ := n + 2
    let k2 : ℚ := m + 2
    have h_eq : (2 * k1 + 1) ^ 2 = (2 * k2 + 1) ^ 2 := by linear_combination -4 * hz
    have h_pos1 : 0 ≤ 2 * k1 + 1 := by nlinarith
    have h_pos2 : 0 ≤ 2 * k2 + 1 := by nlinarith
    have : k1 = k2 := by
      have := (sq_eq_sq h_pos1 h_pos2).mp h_eq
      linarith
    norm_cast at this

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let m : ℚ := n + 2
    let d := m^2 + m + 1
    let a := (m + 1) / d
    let b := m * (m + 1) / d
    let c := -m / d
    (a / (a - 1), b / (b - 1), c / (c - 1))
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (_ : Set.range f ⊆ _) (Set.infinite_range_of_injective _)
  · intro n1 n2 h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    let m1 : ℚ := n1 + 2; let m2 : ℚ := n2 + 2
    let a1 := (m1 + 1) / (m1^2 + m1 + 1)
    let a2 := (m2 + 1) / (m2^2 + m2 + 1)
    have ha : a1 = a2 := by
      have : a1 / (a1 - 1) = a2 / (a2 - 1) := h.1
      have h1 : a1 ≠ 1 := by field_simp [nlinarith]; nlinarith
      have h2 : a2 ≠ 1 := by field_simp [nlinarith]; nlinarith
      rwa [div_eq_div_iff (sub_ne_zero.mpr h1) (sub_ne_zero.mpr h2),
           mul_sub, mul_sub, mul_one, mul_one, sub_right_inj, eq_comm] at this
    field_simp [nlinarith, nlinarith] at ha
    have : (m1 - m2) * (m1 * m2 + m1 + m2) = 0 := by linear_combination ha
    norm_cast at this; cases' this with h_eq h_pos
    · norm_cast at h_eq; exact h_eq
    · nlinarith
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    let m : ℚ := n + 2
    let d := m^2 + m + 1
    let a := (m + 1) / d
    let b := m * (m + 1) / d
    let c := -m / d
    have hd : d ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have ha : a ≠ 1 := by dsimp [a]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hb : b ≠ 1 := by dsimp [b]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hc : c ≠ 1 := by dsimp [c]; field_simp; nlinarith
    refine ⟨_, _, _, rfl, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ne_eq, div_eq_one_iff_eq (sub_ne_zero.mpr ha), sub_add_cancel, ne_eq,
          div_eq_one_iff_eq (sub_ne_zero.mpr hb), sub_add_cancel, ne_eq,
          div_eq_one_iff_eq (sub_ne_zero.mpr hc), sub_add_cancel]
      exact ⟨by field_simp; nlinarith, by field_simp; nlinarith, by field_simp; nlinarith⟩
    · field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr ha, sub_ne_zero.mpr hb, sub_ne_zero.mpr hc, hd]; ring_nf
      have : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by dsimp [a, b, c]; field_simp [hd]; ring
      rw [this]
    · dsimp [a, b, c]; field_simp [hd, sub_ne_zero.mpr ha, sub_ne_zero.mpr hb, sub_ne_zero.mpr hc]
      ring

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ := n + 2
  let x (n : ℕ) := -(f n + 1) / (f n)^2
  let y (n : ℕ) := -f n * (f n + 1)
  let z (n : ℕ) := f n / (f n + 1)^2
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun n ↦ (x n, y n, z n)) ?_ ?_
  · intro n m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    rcases h with ⟨hx, -⟩
    dsimp [x] at hx
    rw [div_eq_div_iff (by dsimp [f]; nlinarith) (by dsimp [f]; nlinarith)] at hx
    have : (f m - f n) * (f n * f m + f n + f m) = 0 := by
      rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← hx]; ring
    cases mul_eq_zero.mp this with
    | inl h => dsimp [f] at h; exact Nat.cast_injective (by linarith)
    | inr h => dsimp [f] at h; nlinarith
  · intro n
    simp
    let k := f n
    have : k^2 + k + 1 ≠ 0 := by dsimp [k, f]; nlinarith
    have hx : x n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [x]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hy : y n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [y]; nlinarith
    have hz : z n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [z]; field_simp; nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · dsimp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring
    · dsimp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem f ?_ ?_
  · intro n m h
    dsimp [f] at h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    rcases h with ⟨_, h, _⟩
    nlinarith
  · intro n
    dsimp [f]
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have : k ≥ 2 := by simp [k]; norm_num
    have hden : k ^ 2 + k + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp; ring
    · field_simp; ring

let t (n : ℕ) : ℚ := n + 4
  let a (n : ℕ) : ℚ := 2 * (1 - t n) / (t n ^ 2 + 3)
  let k (n : ℕ) : ℚ := (-t n ^ 2 + 2 * t n + 3) / (t n ^ 2 + 3)
  let b (n : ℕ) : ℚ := (-(a n - 1) + k n) / 2
  let c (n : ℕ) : ℚ := (-(a n - 1) - k n) / 2
  let x (n : ℕ) : ℚ := a n / (a n - 1)
  let y (n : ℕ) : ℚ := b n / (b n - 1)
  let z (n : ℕ) : ℚ := c n / (c n - 1)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono (?_ : Set.range (fun n => (x n, y n, z n)) ⊆ _) (Set.infinite_range_of_injective ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    have ht : t n ≥ 4 := by simp [t]; linarith
    have hden : t n ^ 2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have ha1 : a n ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; simp [a] at h; field_simp [hden] at h; nlinarith
    have ha0 : a n ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; simp [a] at h; field_simp [hden] at h; linarith
    have hk2 : k n ^ 2 = -3 * a n ^ 2 + 2 * a n + 1 := by
      simp [k, a]; field_simp [hden]; ring
    have habc : a n + b n + c n = 1 := by simp [b, c]; ring
    have habcs : a n * b n + b n * c n + c n * a n = 0 := by
      simp [b, c]; ring_nf; rw [hk2]; ring
    have hb1 : b n ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at habc habcs;
      have : c n = -a n := by linarith [habc]
      rw [this] at habcs; ring_nf at habcs; exact ha0 (by nlinarith)
    have hc1 : c n ≠ 1 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at habc habcs;
      have : b n = -a n := by linarith [habc]
      rw [this] at habcs; ring_nf at habcs; exact ha0 (by nlinarith)
    have hb0 : b n ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at habcs; simp at habcs; rcases zero_eq_mul.mp habcs with h1 | h1
      exact hc1 h1; exact ha0 h1
    have hc0 : c n ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at habcs; simp at habcs; rcases zero_eq_mul.mp habcs with h1 | h1
      exact ha0 h1; exact hb0 h1
    have ha_ : a n - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr ha1
    have hb_ : b n - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hb1
    have hc_ : c n - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hc1
    simp
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [x]; field_simp; exact ha1
    · simp [y]; field_simp; exact hb1
    · simp [z]; field_simp; exact hc1
    · simp [x, y, z]; field_simp; rw [← sub_eq_zero]
      ring_nf; rw [habc, habcs]; ring
    · rw [show x n ^ 2 / (x n - 1) ^ 2 = a n ^ 2 by simp [x]; field_simp,
          show y n ^ 2 / (y n - 1) ^ 2 = b n ^ 2 by simp [y]; field_simp,
          show z n ^ 2 / (z n - 1) ^ 2 = c n ^ 2 by simp [z]; field_simp]
      have : a n ^ 2 + b n ^ 2 + c n ^ 2 = (a n + b n + c n)^2 - 2 * (a n * b n + b n * c n + c n * a n) := by ring
      rw [this, habc, habcs]; ring
  · intro n m h
    simp [x] at h
    field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr (by
      intro h1; simp [a] at h1; field_simp [show t n ^ 2 + 3 ≠ 0 by nlinarith] at h1
      nlinarith : a n ≠ 1)] at h
    have : a n = a m := by linarith
    simp [a] at this
    have den_n : t n ^ 2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have den_m : t m ^ 2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    field_simp [den_n, den_m] at this
    have h_factor : (2 * (1 - t n) * (t m ^ 2 + 3) - 2 * (1 - t m) * (t n ^ 2 + 3)) =
        2 * (t m - t n) * (t n * t m - t n - t m - 3) := by ring
    rw [h_factor] at this
    rcases zero_eq_mul.mp this with h_eq | h_imp
    · simp [t] at h_eq; linarith
    · have : (t n - 1) * (t m - 1) = 4 := by linarith
      have : t n - 1 ≥ 3 := by simp [t]; linarith
      have : t m - 1 ≥ 3 := by simp [t]; linarith
      nlinarith

let t (k : ℕ) : ℚ := k + 2
  let x (k : ℕ) : ℚ := (1 - (t k)^2) / 4
  let y (k : ℕ) : ℚ := -2 * (t k + 1) / (t k - 1)^2
  let z (k : ℕ) : ℚ := 2 * (t k - 1) / (t k + 1)^2
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective (f := fun k ↦ (x k, y k, z k)) ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨k, rfl⟩
    have ht : t k ≥ 2 := by simp [t]; norm_cast; linarith
    have d1 : t k - 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have d2 : t k + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have d3 : (t k)^2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have hx : x k ≠ 1 := by simp [x]; nlinarith
    have hy : y k ≠ 1 := by simp [y]; field_simp; nlinarith
    have hz : z k ≠ 1 := by simp [z]; field_simp; nlinarith
    refine ⟨x k, y k, z k, ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring
    · rw [← div_pow, ← div_pow, ← div_pow]
      rw [show x k / (x k - 1) = ((t k)^2 - 1) / ((t k)^2 + 3) by simp [x]; field_simp; ring]
      rw [show y k / (y k - 1) = 2 * (t k + 1) / ((t k)^2 + 3) by simp [y]; field_simp; ring]
      rw [show z k / (z k - 1) = 2 * (1 - t k) / ((t k)^2 + 3) by simp [z]; field_simp; ring]
      field_simp; ring
  · intro k m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have : x k = x m := h.1
    simp [x] at this
    have : (t k)^2 = (t m)^2 := by linarith
    have : t k = t m := by
      have : t k > 0 := by simp [t]; linarith
      have : t m > 0 := by simp [t]; linarith
      nlinarith
    simp [t] at this; exact Nat.cast_injective this

let k : ℕ → ℚ := fun n => n + 2
  let x n := k n / (k n + 1) ^ 2
  let y n := -(k n + 1) / k n ^ 2
  let z n := -k n * (k n + 1)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun n => (x n, y n, z n)) ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    have hk : k n ≥ 2 := by simp [k]; linarith
    have hk0 : k n ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have hk1 : k n + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    use x n, y n, z n
    refine ⟨rfl, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro h; simp [x] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; simp [y] at h; field_simp at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; simp [z] at h; nlinarith
    · simp [x, y, z]; field_simp; ring
    · simp [x, y, z]
      have hx : (k n / (k n + 1) ^ 2) - 1 ≠ 0 := by field_simp; nlinarith
      have hy : (-(k n + 1) / k n ^ 2) - 1 ≠ 0 := by field_simp; nlinarith
      have hz : (-k n * (k n + 1)) - 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
      field_simp [hx, hy, hz]; ring
  · intro n m h
    simp [x, y, z] at h; rcases h with ⟨_, _, hz⟩
    replace hz : k n * (k n + 1) = k m * (k m + 1) := by linarith [hz]
    have : k n + k m + 1 > 0 := by simp [k]; linarith
    have : k n = k m := by nlinarith
    simp [k] at this; exact this

let k (n : ℕ) : ℚ := n + 2
  let a (n : ℕ) := (k n + 1) / (k n ^ 2 + k n + 1)
  let b (n : ℕ) := (k n * (k n + 1)) / (k n ^ 2 + k n + 1)
  let c (n : ℕ) := -k n / (k n ^ 2 + k n + 1)
  let x (n : ℕ) := a n / (a n - 1)
  let y (n : ℕ) := b n / (b n - 1)
  let z (n : ℕ) := c n / (c n - 1)
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (fun n => (x n, y n, z n)) ?_ ?_
  · intro n m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    rcases h with ⟨_, _, hz⟩
    have D_pos (i : ℕ) : 0 < k i ^ 2 + k i + 1 := by dsimp [k]; nlinarith
    have D_ne_zero (i : ℕ) : k i ^ 2 + k i + 1 ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt (D_pos i)
    have hc_inj : c n = c m := by
      have aux (t : ℚ) (h : t ≠ 1) : t / (t - 1) / (t / (t - 1) - 1) = t := by
        field_simp [sub_ne_zero.2 h]
      have hcn : c n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [c]; rw [div_ne_iff (D_ne_zero n)]; nlinarith
      have hcm : c m ≠ 1 := by dsimp [c]; rw [div_ne_iff (D_ne_zero m)]; nlinarith
      rw [← aux (c n) hcn, ← aux (c m) hcm, hz]
    dsimp [c] at hc_inj
    rw [div_eq_div_iff (D_ne_zero n) (D_ne_zero m)] at hc_inj
    have : (k m - k n) * (k n * k m - 1) = 0 := by
      rw [← sub_eq_zero] at hc_inj; convert hc_inj using 1; ring
    rcases mul_eq_zero.1 this with h | h
    · dsimp [k] at h; linarith
    · dsimp [k] at h; nlinarith
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have D_ne_zero : k n ^ 2 + k n + 1 ≠ 0 := by dsimp [k]; nlinarith
    have ha : a n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [a]; rw [div_ne_iff D_ne_zero]; nlinarith
    have hb : b n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [b]; rw [div_ne_iff D_ne_zero]; nlinarith
    have hc : c n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [c]; rw [div_ne_iff D_ne_zero]; nlinarith
    have hx : x n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [x]; rw [div_ne_iff (sub_ne_zero.2 ha)]; nlinarith
    have hy : y n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [y]; rw [div_ne_iff (sub_ne_zero.2 hb)]; nlinarith
    have hz : z n ≠ 1 := by dsimp [z]; rw [div_ne_iff (sub_ne_zero.2 hc)]; nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [x, y, z]
      field_simp [sub_ne_zero.2 ha, sub_ne_zero.2 hb, sub_ne_zero.2 hc]
      dsimp [a, b, c]; field_simp [D_ne_zero]; ring
    · rw [x, y, z]
      field_simp [sub_ne_zero.2 ha, sub_ne_zero.2 hb, sub_ne_zero.2 hc]
      dsimp [a, b, c]; field_simp [D_ne_zero]; ring

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  apply Set.Infinite.mono (s := Set.range f)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    dsimp only [f]
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have hk : k ≥ 2 := by norm_cast; linarith
    have hk0 : k ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have hk1 : k + 1 ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have h1 : -(k + 1) / k ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by field_simp; nlinarith
    have h2 : -k * (k + 1) ≠ 1 := by nlinarith
    have h3 : k / (k + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by field_simp; nlinarith
    use -(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -k * (k + 1), k / (k + 1) ^ 2
    refine ⟨⟨h1, h2, h3⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · field_simp; ring
    · field_simp; ring
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    simp only [f, Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have : (n : ℚ) + 2 = m + 2 := by nlinarith [h.2.1]
    norm_cast at this

let m (n : ℕ) : ℚ := n + 4
  let a (n : ℕ) := 2 * (m n + 1) / (m n ^ 2 + 3)
  let b (n : ℕ) := 2 * (1 - m n) / (m n ^ 2 + 3)
  let c (n : ℕ) := (m n ^ 2 - 1) / (m n ^ 2 + 3)
  let x (n : ℕ) := a n / (a n - 1)
  let y (n : ℕ) := b n / (b n - 1)
  let z (n : ℕ) := c n / (c n - 1)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun n ↦ (x n, y n, z n)) ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    have hden : m n ^ 2 + 3 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    have ha : a n ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [a] at h; nlinarith
    have hb : b n ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [b] at h; nlinarith
    have hc : c n ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [c] at h; nlinarith
    have hx : x n ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [x] at h; exact ha h
    have hy : y n ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [y] at h; exact hb h
    have hz : z n ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [z] at h; exact hc h
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · have : a n + b n + c n = 1 := by field_simp [a, b, c]; ring
      have : a n * b n + b n * c n + c n * a n = 0 := by field_simp [a, b, c]; ring
      field_simp [x, y, z]; nlinarith
    · have H : x n ^ 2 / (x n - 1) ^ 2 = a n ^ 2 := by field_simp [x]; ring
      rw [H, (by field_simp [y]; ring : y n ^ 2 / (y n - 1) ^ 2 = b n ^ 2),
          (by field_simp [z]; ring : z n ^ 2 / (z n - 1) ^ 2 = c n ^ 2)]
      have : a n + b n + c n = 1 := by field_simp [a, b, c]; ring
      have : a n * b n + b n * c n + c n * a n = 0 := by field_simp [a, b, c]; ring
      nlinarith
  · intro n1 n2 h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have hy := h.2.1
    have hb : b n1 = b n2 := by
      field_simp [y] at hy
      have : b n1 ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [b] at h; nlinarith
      have : b n2 ≠ 1 := by intro h; field_simp [b] at h; nlinarith
      nlinarith
    have : (b n1 - b n2) * (m n1 ^ 2 + 3) * (m n2 ^ 2 + 3) / 2 =
           (m n2 - m n1) * (m n1 * m n2 - m n1 - m n2 - 3) := by field_simp [b]; ring
    rw [hb] at this
    simp only [sub_self, mul_zero, zero_div, zero_eq_mul] at this
    rcases this with h | h
    · simp [m] at h; exact Nat.cast_injective h
    · exfalso
      have : (m n1 - 1) * (m n2 - 1) - 4 = m n1 * m n2 - m n1 - m n2 - 3 := by ring
      rw [← this] at h; have : (m n1 - 1) * (m n2 - 1) = 4 := by linarith
      have : (m n1 - 1) * (m n2 - 1) ≥ 9 := by apply mul_le_mul <;> (simp [m]; linarith)
      linarith

let x_fn (n : ℕ) : ℚ := -((n : ℚ) + 3) / ((n : ℚ) + 2) ^ 2
  let y_fn (n : ℕ) : ℚ := -((n : ℚ) + 2) * ((n : ℚ) + 3)
  let z_fn (n : ℕ) : ℚ := ((n : ℚ) + 2) / ((n : ℚ) + 3) ^ 2
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := (x_fn n, y_fn n, z_fn n)
  have f_inj : Function.Injective f := by
    intro n m h
    simp only [f, x_fn, y_fn, z_fn, Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    rcases h with ⟨_, h2, _⟩
    nlinarith
  apply (Set.infinite_range_of_injective f_inj).mono
  rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  use x_fn n, y_fn n, z_fn n
  let k : ℚ := n + 2
  have hk : k ≥ 2 := by simp [k]; linarith
  have hx : x_fn n = -(k+1)/k^2 := by simp [x_fn, k]; ring
  have hy : y_fn n = -k*(k+1) := by simp [y_fn, k]; ring
  have hz : z_fn n = k/(k+1)^2 := by simp [z_fn, k]; ring
  have h_ne_zero : k^2 + k + 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  have h0 : x_fn n ≠ 1 ∧ y_fn n ≠ 1 ∧ z_fn n ≠ 1 := by
    constructor
    · rw [hx]; field_simp; nlinarith
    constructor
    · rw [hy]; nlinarith
    · rw [hz]; field_simp; nlinarith
  refine ⟨h0, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
  · rw [hx, hy, hz]; field_simp; ring
  · have t1 : x_fn n / (x_fn n - 1) = (k+1)/(k^2+k+1) := by rw [hx]; field_simp; ring
    have t2 : y_fn n / (y_fn n - 1) = (k^2+k)/(k^2+k+1) := by rw [hy]; field_simp; ring
    have t3 : z_fn n / (z_fn n - 1) = -k/(k^2+k+1) := by rw [hz]; field_simp; ring
    rw [t1, t2, t3]; field_simp; ring

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(k * (k + 1)), k / (k + 1) ^ 2, -(k + 1) / k ^ 2)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective f ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    dsimp only [f]
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have hk : k ≥ 2 := by simp [k]; norm_num
    refine ⟨-(k * (k + 1)), k / (k + 1) ^ 2, -(k + 1) / k ^ 2, ?_, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp; nlinarith
    · field_simp <;> try ring <;> nlinarith
    · field_simp <;> try ring <;> nlinarith
  · intro n m h
    dsimp only [f] at h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq, neg_inj] at h
    rcases h with ⟨h, -⟩
    zify at h
    nlinarith

let f (k : ℚ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ := (-(1 + k) / k ^ 2, -k * (1 + k), k / (1 + k) ^ 2)
  let S := {k : ℚ | 1 < k}
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.Infinite.image (s := S) ?_ ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩
    have hk0 : k ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have hk1 : k ≠ -1 := by linarith
    have hden : 1 + k + k^2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    use -(1 + k) / k ^ 2, -k * (1 + k), k / (1 + k) ^ 2
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · intro h; field_simp [hk0] at h; nlinarith
    · intro h; nlinarith
    · intro h; field_simp [hk1] at h; nlinarith
    · field_simp [hk0, hk1]; ring
    · field_simp [hk0, hk1, hden]; ring
  · intro a ha b hb h
    simp [f] at h
    have h1 : -(1 + a) / a ^ 2 = -(1 + b) / b ^ 2 := h.1
    have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := by linarith
    have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := by linarith
    field_simp [ha0, hb0] at h1
    nlinarith
  · refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun n : ℕ => (n : ℚ) + 2) ?_)
    · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩; simp; norm_cast; linarith
    · intro x y h; simp at h; exact h

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 1
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -(k ^ 2 + k), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem f
  · intro n m h
    dsimp [f] at h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    rcases h with ⟨_, h, _⟩
    let k : ℚ := n + 1; let j : ℚ := m + 1
    have : k ≥ 1 := by simp [k]; linarith
    have : j ≥ 1 := by simp [j]; linarith
    nlinarith
  · intro n
    let k : ℚ := n + 1
    have : k ≥ 1 := by simp [k]; linarith
    simp only [f, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    refine ⟨(f n).1, (f n).2.1, (f n).2.2, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · dsimp; field_simp; nlinarith
    · dsimp; nlinarith
    · dsimp; field_simp; nlinarith
    · dsimp; field_simp; ring
    · dsimp; field_simp; ring
